title: night: space-filling square artwork v2
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Square 1:1 social artwork regenerated to use the full canvas (was: flyer padded with wide margins). Referenced by scheduled Buffer posts. Already deployed manually.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Night fills the frame
gist.blurb: The night artwork stopped arriving as a tiny flyer in a very large room. Fresh square and 3:4 crops now use the canvas they were given.
gist.summary: Regenerated the Night campaign’s 1:1 social artwork to fill the full canvas, with new square, 3:4, and wide image assets for scheduled posts.
gist.impact: Night posts now display as intentional full-frame artwork instead of a padded flyer surrounded by wide margins.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy nighttime pixel-art garden scene framed edge-to-edge like a finished social card: Polly, wearing a tiny moon-and-stars cap, carefully hangs a full-bleed square artwork on a glowing retro display while vines and pixel flowers fill the corners. The visual metaphor is the artwork finally occupying its whole frame, with warm moonlight and prominent lime-green accents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny moon-and-stars cap, hanging a full-canvas square night illustration on a retro glowing display in a moonlit garden; pixel flowers, vines, and code-plants naturally fill every edge of the composition. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender-to-cream gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle CRT glow, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and a tiny moon-and-stars cap, hanging a full-canvas square night illustration on a retro glowing display in a moonlit garden; pixel flowers, vines, and code-plants naturally fill every edge of the composition. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender-to-cream gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle CRT glow, emotionally warm.
